summary: Iteration 43: Complete testing of Landing Page Redesign with new Landing Hero Manager. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright. The landing page displays the 5-section layout correctly: Header/Nav, Hero (2-col with countdown + video placeholder), Get in Touch (2-col with image placeholder + form), Waiting List (white bg, centered form), Footer (2-col with logo/desc + social icons). Admin panel has Landing Page section with Hero, Content, Subscribers, Contacts managers all working.

design_issues.screen: Landing Page - Get in Touch section
issues: Contact section title shows test data suffix '4c86d4dd' - CMS content needs cleanup
Submit button text shows 'Send my Message 23' - the '23' is test data in CMS

action_items: OPTIONAL: Clean up CMS test data (contact_title has '4c86d4dd' suffix, contact_btn_text has '23')
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.js: Well-structured 5-section layout with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
LandingPage.js: Hero section correctly implements 2-column grid with countdown on left, video placeholder on right
LandingPage.js: Get in Touch section has 2-column layout with image placeholder left, form right
LandingPage.js: Waiting List section has white background with centered form (Name, Last Name, Email)
LandingPage.js: Footer has 2-column layout with logo+description left, social icons right, copyright center
LandingPage.js: Cookie banner with Accept/Decline buttons persists to localStorage correctly
LandingHeroManager.js: Full CRUD for hero slides with title, subtitle, description (rich text), background, video URL, 3 button texts, order

LandingContentManager.js: Has all required sections - Nav links (4), Get in Touch (title/subtitle/description/image/form placeholders), Waiting List (title/subtitle/btn), Footer (description/social title/copyright), Cookie Banner
LandingSubscribersManager.js: Shows waiting list submissions with First Name, Last Name, Email, Date columns + delete action
LandingContactsManager.js: Shows contact submissions with Name, Email, Subject, Date columns + click to view message detail dialog
AdminLayout.js: Sidebar correctly has 'LANDING PAGE' group with Hero, Content, Subscribers, Contacts links (lines 25-29)
landing.py: Backend routes properly implement CRUD for landing-hero, landing-content, landing-subscribers, landing-contacts with admin auth
seed_data_creation: Test subscribers and contacts created during testing (prefixed with test_, playwright_, contact_test_, duplicate_test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing Page Redesign is fully implemented and tested. Key verified features: (1) Landing page at / shows 5-section layout: fixed header with logo + 4 nav links, hero with 2-col (countdown+buttons LEFT, video placeholder RIGHT), Get in Touch with 2-col (image LEFT, form RIGHT), Waiting List with white bg and centered form, Footer with 2-col (logo+desc LEFT, social icons RIGHT, copyright center). (2) Admin sidebar has 'LANDING PAGE' group with Hero, Content, Subscribers, Contacts links. (3) Landing Hero Manager supports CRUD for hero slides with title, description, background, video URL, 3 button texts. (4) Landing Content Manager has all sections: Nav links (4), Get in Touch fields, Waiting List fields, Footer fields, Cookie Banner. (5) Subscribers manager shows waiting list form submissions with Name/Last Name/Email columns. (6) Contacts manager shows contact form submissions with Name/Email/Subject columns + click to view message detail. (7) Both forms submit correctly and show success messages. (8) Cookie banner Accept/Decline works with localStorage persistence. (9) /my-account route is accessible (shows member login, not landing page). (10) Scroll animations work on Get in Touch and Waiting List sections. Landing page is ENABLED with launch date 2026-04-20T09:00.

landing_page_5_section_layout.details: Landing page shows all 5 sections: Header/Nav, Hero (2-col), Get in Touch (2-col), Waiting List (white bg), Footer (2-col)

header_nav_4_links.details: Header has logo left + 4 nav links right (Home, More Information, Membership Lounge, Waiting List)

hero_2_column_layout.details: Hero section has 2-column grid - left has title 'Launching in:', countdown (Days/Hours/Minutes/Seconds), 3 CTA buttons; right has video placeholder

get_in_touch_2_column.details: Get in Touch section has 2-column layout - left has image placeholder, right has title + contact form (Name, Email, Subject, Message + Submit)

waiting_list_white_bg_centered.details: Waiting List section has white background, centered title + subtitle + form (Name, Last Name, Email + Submit)

footer_2_column.details: Footer has 2-column layout - left has logo + description, right has 'Follow Us' + social icons, bottom center has copyright

admin_login.details: Admin login at /admin/login works with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!

admin_sidebar_landing_page_group.details: Admin sidebar has 'LANDING PAGE' group with Hero, Content, Subscribers, Contacts links

landing_hero_manager_crud.details: Landing Hero Manager supports create/edit/delete hero slides with title, description, background, video URL, 3 button texts, order

landing_content_manager_sections.details: Landing Content Manager has all sections: Nav links (4), Get in Touch (title/subtitle/description/image/form placeholders), Waiting List (title/subtitle/btn), Footer (description/social title/copyright), Cookie Banner

landing_subscribers_manager.details: Subscribers manager shows waiting list form submissions with First Name, Last Name, Email, Date columns + delete action

landing_contacts_manager.details: Contacts manager shows contact form submissions with Name, Email, Subject, Date columns + click to view message detail dialog

api_landing_contact.details: POST /api/public/landing-contact accepts first_name, email, subject, message fields

api_landing_subscribe.details: POST /api/public/landing-subscribe accepts first_name, last_name, email fields

api_admin_landing_hero_crud.details: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/landing-hero works for hero slides CRUD (requires admin auth)

waiting_list_form_submission.details: Waiting list form submits correctly and shows success message 'You're on the list!'

contact_form_submission.details: Contact form submits correctly and shows success message 'Message sent!'

scroll_animations.details: Scroll animations work when scrolling to Get in Touch and Waiting List sections (using IntersectionObserver)

cookie_banner.details: Cookie banner appears at bottom, Accept/Decline buttons work and persist in localStorage as 'lp_cookie_consent'

my_account_accessible.details: /my-account route shows member login page, not landing page
